subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-03-16 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: During the reign of Mu'awiyah, the caliph, there was an Israelite who claimed to be a Muslim.
subcodes.first_line_orig: در زمان معاویه شخصی از خاندان اسرائلیان بود
subcodes.subjects: @stories; anecdotes, @Qur'an and Hadith quotation and interpretation
